summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. The shard has no shared canonical; open non-security PRs are kept open as independent inventory items unless a security route is required. Security-sensitive #68060 and linked #64613 are quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.

actions.reason: Standalone Telegram command-menu PR with proof blocker; keep open for normal maintainer review rather than closing or merging from this inventory shard.

Standalone feature/config PR with linked closed issue and unresolved review/proof blockers; keep open for normal PR review.
Non-security split cleanup PR with dirty merge state and proof blocker; keep open, do not close as low-signal because low-signal closeout is disabled.
Standalone chat-history filtering PR with failing proof/check context; keep open and route only the separate security issue.
